name: Frank Caliendo
blurb: Frank Caliendo is an American comedian and impressionist who rose to prominence on MADtv (2001-2006), where he became known for impersonations of George W.
bio: Frank Caliendo is an American comedian and impressionist who rose to prominence on MADtv (2001-2006), where he became known for impersonations of George W. Bush and sportscaster John Madden. He hosted the TBS sketch series Frank TV beginning in 2007 and has performed a repertoire of more than 100 impressions. He is a frequent guest on The Bob and Tom Show and in sports broadcasting.

timeline.ev: Becomes the shows George W. Bush impersonator
Sketch series Frank TV premieres on TBS

accolades: Host of Frank TV on TBS
Known for a repertoire of over 100 impressions
